## Lukas Eicher

Co-Founder & CPO Nelly

Lukas, a former Product Manager at Klarna, previously founded Complore. This venture conceptualized and developed an online-banking-based GwG-compliant identification procedure (KYC), later evolving into Klarna Ident. It became the inaugural solely digital KYC procedure in the German market.
